text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Vrooooom...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Excellent. The bus is precisely on schedule. Let's
get in.
choice_data_list: Are you happy with how summer camp went?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Of course. How could I not be when I made so
much progress in preparation for the Japan Cup?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Let's go over the details of my progress in the bus
and—

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Heeey! Wait for meee!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Falcon?! Why are you here?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
You should have been aboard the bus that left
fifteen minutes ago. We even went over your
itinerary last night.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! ☆

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I see... So your impromptu concert for the locals
went longer than expected, which is why you're
tardy...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Falcon...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I-it was just supposed be a quick show! It was only
gonna be one song to say goodbye to everyone
we met here...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But you should've heard the crowd! ...You must be
disappointed in me, huh?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Yes. I am.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Awww... ☆

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
But I am only disappointed by the fact that you
failed to notify anyone about your show in
advance.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
You should have informed the instructors and
staff about it the moment you decided to hold
one since a delay was inevitable.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
After all, your concerts are always so popular.
One song alone would never have sufficed.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Oh, Flash! ☆☆

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The bus will depart momentarily. Please do not
make a scene.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
You're sitting too close, Falcon. Please shift five
centimeters to the right.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I don't wanna! ☆ In fact, I'm gonna scooch five centimeters closer! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, our lively summer camp comes to a
close... And Eishin Flash doesn't even insist on
going over our notes in detail on the ride back.
